version_description: Corrected chords for a version 2,including Instrumentals and intro,written by Glenn Frey 1985.https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=lwLBIs79INQ.
tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.version_description: Original studio version - youtube link: https://youtu.be/utocFaN9NwM.

content:
The Eagles - You Belong To The City

                          You Tube Link:https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=lwLBIs79INQ
[ch]Gmaj7[/ch]   300002
[ch]Am7[/ch]     x02010
[ch]Bm7[/ch]     224232
[ch]Em7[/ch]     022030
[ch]Cmaj7[/ch]   x32000
[ch]G/B[/ch]     x20033
[ch]Dsus4[/ch]   xx0233
[ch]B5[/ch]      x244xx

   [Intro]
[ch]Gmaj7[/ch]    [ch]Am7[/ch]   [ch]Bm7[/ch]   [ch]Am7[/ch]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]   [ch]Em7[/ch] [ch]Gmaj7[/ch] [ch]G/B[/ch]   [ch]Am7[/ch]  [ch]Dsus4[/ch]
N.C.[/tab]
[ch]Em[/ch]    [ch]Em[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]    [ch]Em[/ch]    [ch]C[/ch]

   [Verse 1]
[tab]    [ch]Em[/ch]
The sun goes down the night rolls in[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
You can feel it starting all over again[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Em[/ch]
The moon comes up and the music calls[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Am[/ch]
You're getting tired of staring at the same four walls[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Em[/ch]
You're out of your room and down on the street[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
Move through the crowds in the midnight heat[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Em[/ch]
The traffic roars the sirens scream[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
Look at the faces it's just like a dream[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                         [ch]B5[/ch]
Nobody knows where you're going[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                         [ch]B5[/ch]
Nobody cares where you've been[/tab]


   [Chorus]
[tab]       [ch]Em[/ch]                     [ch]C[/ch]
'Cause you belong to the city,You belong to the night[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                                        [ch]Em[/ch]
Living in a river of darkness beneath the neon light[/tab]
[tab]                          [ch]C[/ch]
You were born in the city,Concrete under your feet[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Am[/ch]                                        [ch]Em[/ch]
It's in your moves it's in your blood,You're a man of the street[/tab]


   [Instrumental]
[ch]Em[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]     [ch]Am[/ch]     [ch]Em[/ch]


   [Verse 2]
[tab]         [ch]Em[/ch]
When you said goodbye you were on the run[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
Tryin' to get away from the things you'd done[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Em[/ch]
Now you're back again and you're feeling strange[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
So much has happened but nothing has changed[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                             [ch]B5[/ch]
Still don't know where you're going[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]C[/ch]                         [ch]B5[/ch]
Your still just a face in the crowd[/tab]


   [Chorus]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                     [ch]C[/ch]
You belong to the city,You belong to the night[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                                        [ch]Em[/ch]
Living in a river of darkness beneath the neon light[/tab]
[tab]                          [ch]C[/ch]
You were born in the city,Concrete under your feet[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Am[/ch]                                      [ch]Em[/ch]
It's in your blood it's in your moves,Your a man of the streets[/tab]


   [Bridge]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]      [ch]Em7[/ch]
You can feel it[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]       [ch]Am[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]
You can taste it[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Em7[/ch]
You can see it[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]       [ch]Am[/ch]      [ch]C[/ch]
You can face it[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Em[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]
You can hear it hey...[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Am[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]
You're getting near it hey...[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Em[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]
You're wanna make it Oh-oh[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Am[/ch]      [ch]C[/ch]
'Cause you can take it Oh-oh-oh[/tab]


   [Chorus]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                  [ch]G[/ch]
You belong to the city[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                   [ch]C[/ch]
You belong to the night[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                  [ch]G[/ch]
You belong to the city[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                   [ch]C[/ch]
You belong to the night[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]Am[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]
You belong.....You belong...[/tab]

   [Outro]
[ch]Em[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]Am[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]Am[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]
N.C.[/tab]
[ch]Em[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]Em[/ch]   [ch]Am[/ch]         x2


Mark W
